title.en: 1 Bedroom Condo for sale at The ESSE Asoke
title.zh: 1 Bedroom Condo for sale at The ESSE Asoke
title.th: 1 Bedroom Condo for sale at The ESSE Asoke

summary.th: ขาย: 1 นอน 36 ตร.ม. ราคา 6,451,000 บาท (DotProperty #52db76e04166-9c4f-1282-0382-bc9b9089)

description.en:
Experience refined CBD living at The Esse Asoke, one of the most prestigious luxury condos in Bangkok’s prime Asoke CBD. This stylish 1-bedroom, 1-bathroom condo offers 36.16 sqm of efficiently designed living space on the 22nd floor, with beautiful city, garden, and park views — a rare green outlook in one of Bangkok’s busiest business districts.
Property Details

1 Bedroom | 1 Bathroom
36.16 sqm
22nd floor high-floor unit
City, garden, and park views
Private balcony
Fully equipped modern kitchen
Built-in wardrobes for smart storage
19.50% below market price

Why This Unit Stands Out
This unit combines premium CBD convenience with a calm green view, making it more desirable than many typical city-facing condos.
The high-floor position provides privacy and an elevated city atmosphere, while the modern kitchen, custom built-in wardrobes, and private balcony create a refined living space ready for everyday comfort.
Nearby Locations

MRT Phetchaburi: approx. 600 m
BTS Asok: approx. 900 m
Terminal 21 Asok: approx. 950 m
Benjakitti Park: approx. 1.4 km
Bumrungrad International Hospital: approx. 2 km

Ideal For
Ideal for young executives, expats, CBD professionals, and investors seeking

title.zh: 2 Bedroom Condo for sale at The ESSE Asoke
title.th: 2 Bedroom Condo for sale at The ESSE Asoke

summary.zh: 出售：2卧，57㎡，15,038,000 泰铢。来源 DotProperty #e7e3fdfe8aa0-a5f0-cc02-254c-1aa4a089。
summary.th: ขาย: 2 นอน 57 ตร.ม. ราคา 15,038,000 บาท (DotProperty #e7e3fdfe8aa0-a5f0-cc02-254c-1aa4a089)

description.en:
PropertyScout ID 448963


Modern 2-duplex bedroom 2-bathroom condominium from the 14th floor of The ESSE ASOKE building, in the Watthana district, close to
BTS Asoke, perfect for an urban lifestyle. 




 * Fully furnished
 * Fitness
 * Swimming pool
 * Garden & BBQ
 * Parking space available








Watthana is one of the economic districts in Bangkok, with many condominiums and hotels. This district is a shopping hub with
large shopping malls offering brand-name fashion and goods, also food courts, and international restaurants. There are stylish
bistros and cool cafes, and Japanese restaurants fill the buzzing Thonglor district. Stylish rooftop bars offer sweeping city
views, while the area around Ekkamai BTS Station is known for its high-end night bars and innovative cocktail scene. Neighboring
districts are Ratchathewi, Huai Khwang, Suan Luang, Phra Khanong, Khlong Toei, and Pathum Wan. Transportation: There are BTS Nana,
Asok, Phrom Phong, Ekkamai, and Phra Khanong, MRT Sukhumvit, and also Khlong Saen Saep boat service.




Haven’t found a place you love yet?

Our fast, professional, and multilingual team focuses on residential properties for rent and sell across Thailand
